### Receive Inbound Webhook

Entry point: listens for POST calls on `/wf00644-request`. Use the TEST url while building, switch callers to the PRODUCTION url after publishing.

Next: Keep Valid Requests

### Keep Valid Requests

Drops items that fail the condition; only qualifying items continue (no false branch).

Next: Classify with AI

### Classify with AI

LLM classification into: Urgent, Routine, FYI (+fallback). Output port order matches this list.

Ports: тСатЖТ Store as Urgent ┬╖ тСбтЖТ Store as Routine, Capture Failure Context ┬╖ тСвтЖТ Store as FYI ┬╖ тСгтЖТ Alert Discord тАФ Other

тЪа failures exit via the error rail

### Anthropic Chat Model

Chat model powering the AI step (model: `claude-sonnet-4-5-20250929`). Swap providers here without rewiring.

Feeds **Classify with AI** as `languageModel`

ЁЯФС Anthropic API key

### Store as Urgent

Appends a new row to 'Request Tracker' тАФ a human-readable audit trail that doesn't require opening n8n to inspect.

Ports: тСатЖТ Reunite Branches ┬╖ тСбтЖТ Capture Failure Context

тЖ╗ retries 3├Ч/2s ┬╖ тЪа failures exit via the error rail ┬╖ ЁЯФС Google OAuth2 / service account

### Store as Routine

Appends a new row to 'Request Tracker' тАФ a human-readable audit trail that doesn't require opening n8n to inspect.

Ports: тСатЖТ Reunite Branches ┬╖ тСбтЖТ Capture Failure Context

тЖ╗ retries 3├Ч/2s ┬╖ тЪа failures exit via the error rail ┬╖ ЁЯФС Google OAuth2 / service account

### Store as FYI

Appends a new row to 'Request Tracker' тАФ a human-readable audit trail that doesn't require opening n8n to inspect.

Ports: тСатЖТ Reunite Branches ┬╖ тСбтЖТ Capture Failure Context

тЖ╗ retries 3├Ч/2s ┬╖ тЪа failures exit via the error rail ┬╖ ЁЯФС Google OAuth2 / service account

### Alert Discord тАФ Other

Posts to a Discord channel via an incoming webhook тАФ no bot token needed, the webhook URL on the credential is the only secret.

Ports: тСатЖТ Reunite Branches ┬╖ тСбтЖТ Capture Failure Context

тЖ╗ retries 3├Ч/2s ┬╖ тЪа failures exit via the error rail ┬╖ ЁЯФС Discord webhook URL

### Reunite Branches

Rejoins 4 branches into one stream (mode: append) so downstream logic runs once.

Next: Serialize Run Output (CSV)

### Serialize Run Output (CSV)

Serializes items to a CSV binary file.

Next: Archive Copy to Google Drive

### Archive Copy to Google Drive

Uploads the generated file to Google Drive as a timestamped archive copy.

Ports: тСатЖТ Fingerprint for Idempotency ┬╖ тСбтЖТ Capture Failure Context

тЖ╗ retries 3├Ч/2s ┬╖ тЪа failures exit via the error rail ┬╖ ЁЯФС Google OAuth2

### Fingerprint for Idempotency

Custom JavaScript: Build a stable idempotency key per request (djb2 hash, no deps)

Next: Drop Already-Processed Items

### Drop Already-Processed Items

Cross-execution dedupe: remembers keys it has processed before and drops repeats тАФ the idempotency guard.

Next: Stamp Completion Time

### Stamp Completion Time

Stamps `completedAt` with the current time for auditing.

Next: Persist Run Metadata

### Persist Run Metadata

Saves key fields onto the execution record тАФ searchable later in n8n's execution list.

Next: Enrich with Reference Data

### Enrich with Reference Data

GET https://enrichment.example.com/v2/lookup тАФ retries 3├Ч with backoff on failure.

Ports: тСатЖТ Fold In Enrichment Fields ┬╖ тСбтЖТ Capture Failure Context

тЖ╗ retries 3├Ч/2s ┬╖ тЪа failures exit via the error rail ┬╖ ЁЯФС API key / bearer for the target API

### Fold In Enrichment Fields

Shapes the item: writes `enrichedAt`, `enrichmentSource`. Keeps the schema explicit between stages.

Next: Summarize Run Stats

### Summarize Run Stats

Shapes the item: writes `runAt`, `itemCount`, `status`. Keeps the schema explicit between stages.

Next: Append Audit Row (Google Sheets)

### Append Audit Row (Google Sheets)

Appends a new row to 'Request Tracker' тАФ a human-readable audit trail that doesn't require opening n8n to inspect.

Ports: тСатЖТ Send Summary to Discord ┬╖ тСбтЖТ Capture Failure Context

тЖ╗ retries 3├Ч/2s ┬╖ тЪа failures exit via the error rail ┬╖ ЁЯФС Google OAuth2 / service account

### Send Summary to Discord

Posts to a Discord channel via an incoming webhook тАФ no bot token needed, the webhook URL on the credential is the only secret.

тЖ╗ retries 3├Ч/2s ┬╖ тЪа failures exit via the error rail ┬╖ ЁЯФС Discord webhook URL

### Capture Failure Context

Shapes the item: writes `failedNode`, `errorMessage`, `workflow`. Keeps the schema explicit between stages.

Next: Escalate Failure to Discord

### Escalate Failure to Discord

Posts to a Discord channel via an incoming webhook тАФ no bot token needed, the webhook URL on the credential is the only secret.

Next: Park in Dead-Letter Queue

тЖ╗ retries 3├Ч/2s ┬╖ ЁЯФС Discord webhook URL

# Digest documents with Google Drive and Discord and log the results

**Pattern:** AI Summarize & Route ┬╖ **Level:** Production ┬╖ **Trigger:** Webhook

## What it does
Digest documents with Google Drive and Discord and log the results. It fires the moment an external system calls its webhook.

## Why it exists
Manual task automation is slow and error-prone; this workflow makes the process repeatable, monitored and hands-off, with failures surfaced instead of silently lost.

## Main flow
Receive Inbound Webhook тЖТ Keep Valid Requests тЖТ Classify with AI тЖТ Store as Urgent тЖТ Reunite Branches тЖТ Serialize Run Output (CSV) тЖТ Archive Copy to Google Drive тЖТ тАж

## Use it for
- Teams that want to ai summarize & route without manual effort
- Anyone automating task automation in ai
- Replacing a fragile manual process with a reliable workflow

## You get
- Has retries and error handling built in
- Improves response time
- Keeps your systems in sync

## Before first run
Connect credentials: API key / bearer for the target API; Anthropic API key; Discord webhook URL; Google OAuth2; Google OAuth2 / service account.
Follow the color key: ЁЯЯж entry ┬╖ ЁЯЯк AI ┬╖ ЁЯЯл actions ┬╖ тмЬ utilities ┬╖ ЁЯЯй outputs ┬╖ ЁЯЯе error rail.
Each node has its own doc card underneath тАФ read those before editing.

## Try it now
Sample data is pinned on the trigger тАФ hit **Execute Workflow** to watch it flow through every node before connecting any real credentials. Unpin the trigger (right-click тЖТ Unpin) when you're ready to go live.

## Design decisions

One Text Classifier node replaces what would otherwise be a chain of brittle IF/Switch keyword checks тАФ the LLM handles the ambiguous cases a rules engine can't. Each category gets its own action node, so a failure in one branch (say, a bad Slack call) never blocks the others; Merge reunites them so the run still reports one clean completion.

## Practice exercises

Already production-grade тАФ deepen your understanding:

1. Add a 4th category with its own action branch.
2. Replace one action (e.g. a Slack ping) with a task-creation node and see how the wiring changes.
3. Feed the classifier deliberately ambiguous text and check which fallback category it lands in.

## ЁЯЫЯ Error handling & retries

External calls retry **3├Ч with 2s backoff**. Anything still failing exits through its node's error output into the red error rail тЖТ context is captured and the on-call channel is alerted. Failures are also parked in a dead-letter queue for replay. Set an n8n **Error Workflow** in settings as the final safety net.

## ЁЯФР Security

Never trust inbound payloads: the webhook path is unguessable. Add header auth or IP allow-listing for defense in depth. Secrets live in n8n credentials тАФ never in node parameters.

## ЁЯдЦ AI cluster

Purple nodes form one AI unit: the root node orchestrates, sub-nodes plug in via typed ports (model / memory / tools / parser). Swap the chat model without rewiring anything else. Costs scale with tokens тАФ keep prompts lean and cap iterations.

## ЁЯЫа Customize me

Quick wins: point the data nodes at your own accounts (see ЁЯФС lines on each card), adjust the trigger cadence, and tune thresholds/labels to your task automation process. Every node card explains its role тАФ safe to extend at any marked branch.
